com.hp.workpath.api.access

Class AbstractAuthenticationService

  • java.lang.Object
    • android.content.Context
      • android.content.ContextWrapper
        • android.app.Service
          • com.hp.workpath.api.access.AbstractAuthenticationService
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    android.content.ComponentCallbacks, android.content.ComponentCallbacks2

    public abstract class AbstractAuthenticationService
extends android.app.Service

    Implementations of this class provide functions to create Workpath authentication agent for integrating with device authentication.

    The Workpath authentication agent implementor can create 3 types of authentication services :

    • Prompt
    • Preprompt
    • Preprompt and Prompt

    Prompt type needs to implement an "Activity" to show the sign in form and has to configure "Activity" name in hpk file using hpktool(in SDK Packages). Preprompt type needs to receive onPrePrompt() event and has to be checked as preprompt option in hpk file.

    When authentication service is started, Workpath platform checks Authentication Agent types which is included in installation option from hpk configuration and decide the next following steps :

    • If Authentication Agent has Prompt, "Activity" will be launched.
    • If Authentication Agent has Preprompt, onPrePrompt() method will be called.

    A Workpath authentication agent which has Preprompt will call AccessService.signIn() method with SignInAction to decide authentication process. More details actions can find in SignInAction.

    Since:
    API 2

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      AbstractAuthenticationService() 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected abstract void onPrePrompt()
      Called to notify the client that prePrompt action is required to proceed the authentication.
      protected abstract void onSignIn(Principal principal)
      Called to notify the client that device has been authenticated successfully with user information.
      protected abstract void onSignOut()
      Called to notify the client that SignOut operation is finished completely by a user request or authenticated user session is expired by timeout.

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractAuthenticationService

        public AbstractAuthenticationService()

    • Method Detail

      • onSignIn

        protected abstract void onSignIn(Principal principal)

        Called to notify the client that device has been authenticated successfully with user information.

        Parameters:
        principal - Authenticated user details.
        Since:
        API 2

      • onSignOut

        protected abstract void onSignOut()

        Called to notify the client that SignOut operation is finished completely by a user request or authenticated user session is expired by timeout.

        Since:
        API 2

      • onPrePrompt

        protected abstract void onPrePrompt()

        Called to notify the client that prePrompt action is required to proceed the authentication. Workpath Authentication Agent can decide actions between SignInAction before starting prompt activity.

        Since:
        API 2
